title: Project Management Officer – Global SAP S/4HANA Transformation (m/w/d)
missing_skills: SAP / SAP S/4HANA experience (von Vorteil – not mandatory)
Projektron or equivalent PM tool experience
key_requirements: Mehrjährige Erfahrung im Projektmanagement, idealerweise in internationalem Transformationsprojekt (REQUIRED)
Sehr gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift (REQUIRED)
Strukturierte Arbeitsweise, diplomatisches Gespür und Organisationstalent (REQUIRED)
Sehr gute MS-Office Kenntnisse sowie Erfahrungen mit Projektmanagement-Tools z.B. Projektron (REQUIRED)
Eigeninitiative sowie selbstständige und ergebnisorientierte Arbeitsweise (REQUIRED)
core_responsibilities: Aufbau globaler Projekt- und Meetingstruktur auf Basis Stakeholder-Analyse
Projektcontrolling inkl. Abstimmung mit internationalen Stream Leads und Steering Committee Unterlagen
Tracking der Projektfortschritte in Streams, konsolidierte Aufbereitung für Gesamtprojektleitung
Schnittstellenkoordination zwischen Workstreams und Sicherstellung reibungsloser Kommunikation
Planung und Durchführung von Workshops für bis zu 300 Teilnehmende national und international
cv_highlights: HSBC PMO: USD 8M global digital transformation programme — directly mirrors medac's international SAP transformation scope
6-workstream coordination at HSBC maps directly to multi-stream PMO role
Steering Committee preparation and C-suite reporting at HSBC directly relevant
Multi-market EMEA/APAC coverage demonstrates international programme experience
Hapag-Lloyd: Agile sprint ceremonies, KPI reporting, stakeholder management in large corporate setting
Trilingual (German, English, Chinese/Cantonese) — exceeds the 'further languages von Vorteil' requirement
Location: Lüneburg (~40km from Wedel) — commute is realistic, especially with 40% remote option
gaps: No SAP or SAP S/4HANA experience — however explicitly listed as 'von Vorteil' (nice to have), not mandatory
No specific Projektron experience — general PM tool proficiency can be positioned as transferable
No pharmaceutical industry experience — functional PMO skills are industry-agnostic and transferable
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC USD 8M global transformation programme: scope, workstream count, Steering Committee cadence
Quantify multi-market coordination: EMEA and APAC stakeholders, time zones, languages managed
Highlight budget tracking dashboard work at HSBC as evidence of Projektcontrolling capability
Emphasise Steering Committee and C-suite reporting preparation as direct role match
Position trilingual ability (DE/EN/ZH) as competitive differentiator for international programme team
Frame Hapag-Lloyd Agile/KPI experience to demonstrate structured methodology and documentation standards
Note proximity to Wedel and openness to hybrid arrangement (40% remote aligns with offer)
recommendation: Strong Apply. Boru's HSBC PMO background (USD 8M global transformation, 6 workstreams, Steering Committee prep, multi-market EMEA/APAC) is a near-direct match for the core responsibilities. The only notable gap is SAP experience, which is explicitly optional ('von Vorteil'). Trilingual capability and international exposure are competitive advantages. Location is practical. Recommend tailoring the CV to foreground the HSBC programme at the top and explicitly mirror the JD language around Projektcontrolling, Workstream-Koordination, and Steering Committee Unterlagen.
